content: TASK-047 checkpoint done under TASK-010: ArchMap is now marked Apache-2.0 for publication. Added root LICENSE, package.json license metadata, THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md, and README/DELIVERY license + trademark notes. npm pack --dry-run confirms LICENSE and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md are included alongside public docs/specs/examples and internal docs/aof remains excluded. Next: continue TASK-010 by either verifying the actual published CDN URL after release candidate or resolving final spec wording/product decision for zone base view vs Add info overlay. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
